overview.value: Leaf Space provides Ground Segment as a Service (GSaaS) solutions for satellite communications, operating a global network of ground stations that enable satellite operators to transmit and receive data. Its core services are Leaf Line, access to a shared ground station network, Leaf Key, dedicated ground stations, and Leaf Hosting, hosted ground station services. The company began as a startup project in Milan, building its first antenna in a garage in 2014.

focus.value: Ground Segment as a Service (GSaaS) for satellite communications
